channel.title: Con Game: Swindlers in 60 Seconds
channel.description: The con artists, grifters, and master fraudsters who fooled the world — every scheme in 60 seconds.
channel.itunes:author: Con Game
channel.itunes:summary: The con artists, grifters, and master fraudsters who fooled the world — every scheme in 60 seconds.

item.title: Kevin Trudeau
item.description: Kevin Trudeau (; born 1962 or 1963) is an American author, salesman, and television personality, who has been convicted of fraud, larceny, and contempt of court, and is also known for promotion of his books and resulting legal cases involving the US Federal Trade Commission. His late-night infomercials, which promoted unsubstantiated health, diet, and financial advice, earned him a fortune but res
